title: Student Academic Periods
description: Information about a student for a specified academic period.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student academic period.

person.title: Person
person.description: The person who is associated with the academic period.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

academicPeriod.title: Academic Period
academicPeriod.description: The academic period to which the student has been associated.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period.

academicLevels.title: Academic Levels
academicLevels.description: The distinct academic levels associated with the student for this period.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The distinct academic level associated with the student for this period.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: An indicator as to whether the academic level is the primary for the student.

academicStatuses.title: Academic Statuses
academicStatuses.description: The student academic statuses for the period.

basis.title: Basis
basis.description: An indicator as to whether the academic status is established for the student overall or specific to a student's academic level.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the academic period status.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

academicPeriodStatus.title: Academic Period Status
academicPeriodStatus.description: The student academic status for the period as established by the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Period Status.

academicLoads.title: Academic Loads
academicLoads.description: The student calculated academic loads for the period.

basis.title: Basis
basis.description: An indicator as to whether the academic load is established for the student overall or specific to a student's academic level.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The academic level associated with the academic load.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

academicLoad.title: Academic Load
academicLoad.description: The student calculated academic load for the period.
